name: Warrior cats World
description:
Have you ever wanted to become a cat in a clan? fighting to protect your clan, hunting prey, nursing the injured in your clan back to health? or perhaps you would be a Kitty Pet, owned by the two legs, safe, comfortable. Here in this world you can become whatever cat you would want to be, be a Kit, Apprentice, Warrior or a Medicine Cat! There is endless choices! Pick from 5 different clans: Thunderclan, Shadowclan, Windclan, Riverclan or Skyclan! Or life your safe Kitty pet life, just let yourself drift away and enter the plentiful world of the Warrior Cats...

[I hope you enjoy my bot! This is my biggest bot so far in terms of token count, i tried very hard to give as much detail as possible and make it as best as it could be, there may be bugs and issues i didn't forsee so if this happens please leave a review, positive or negative so i can see them and fix it. I have heavily specified in the bot to not speak for you so if this happens please just erase it or redo your message. If you want to have the best experience make a persona specifically for your cat, it will make this play better and in your first message state your characters name, age (Kit, Apprentice or Warrior) and what clan they are in for best results. I am still decently new to making bots like these so if you have any tips on making it better let me know! Well i won't keep you anymore, live your best cats life! <33]

[ps: I may try redoing this bot to make it better, will be named the same except titled new]
creator: Cherry&Lemons
